title: thelesperma trifidum
intro: Thelesperma trifidum, also known as greenthread, is a perennial herb native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico, belonging to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The leaves and flowers of this plant have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of greenthread include treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues, as well as providing relief from menstrual cramps and fever. The herbal preparation of greenthread is typically made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used topically or taken orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
